title: Better warden loot
description: A simple mod that makes the warden drop a spawn egg and more exp when killed.
body:
**Better Warden Loot** is a utility mod that modifies the loot table and experience rewards for the Warden. By default, the Warden drops a Sculk Catalyst; this mod expands that behavior to provide rewards more consistent with its difficulty.

**Changes**:

- **Drops**: The Warden now drops one Warden Spawn Egg upon death. (this is not affected by looting)
- **Experience**: The amount of XP dropped has been significantly increased from the vanilla default.
